title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data designed for physical AI and robotic systems. The model forms part of NVIDIA's integrated physical AI stack alongside Vera agent compute and GR00T humanoid robots.
